claims.text: Reinforcement Learning in Traffic Signal Control has limited generalization to dynamic traffic flow variations
claims.source_quote: Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Traffic Signal Control (TSC) faces significant hurdles in real-world deployment due to limited generalization to dynamic traffic flow variations.

claims.text: Existing traffic signal control approaches often overfit static traffic patterns
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often overfit static patterns

claims.text: The proposed framework uses Turning Ratio Randomization to expose agents to dynamic turning probabilities
claims.source_quote: Turning Ratio Randomization, a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios

claims.text: The framework uses an Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space to balance responsiveness and precision
claims.source_quote: a stability-oriented Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space, which balances responsiveness and precision through cyclical, exponential phase adjustments

claims.text: The research uses the MAPPO algorithm with Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution
claims.source_quote: a Neighbor-Based Observation scheme utilizing the MAPPO algorithm with Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE)

claims.text: The proposed framework reduces average waiting time by over 10%
claims.source_quote: Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms standard RL baselines, reducing average waiting time by over 10%

claims.text: The proposed model demonstrates superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios
claims.source_quote: The proposed model exhibits superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios

claims.text: The framework maintains high control stability for traffic signal control
claims.source_quote: maintains high control stability, offering a practical solution for adaptive signal control
